title: Golden Cat Boss
description: This mod adds a Boss that looks like a cat as gold.
body:
# Golden Cat Boss
**This mod adds a Boss that looks like a cat as gold.

You can craft Golden Cat Boss Spawn Egg.

If you are so close to Boss you get blindness 4 effect for 5 seconds.

If you kill it you get 4500 xp (that equals nearly 45 level of experience)

Here is a video about mod **(youtube short) https://youtube.com/shorts/SfTvoDEsSHA?si=_JDgH2FuUFk3_R5o
